import * as Rx from 'rxjs'; import { Writable } from 'stream'; import { Command } from './command'; /** * Class responsible for actually writing output onto a writable stream. */ export declare class OutputWriter { private readonly outputStream; private readonly group; readonly buffers: string[][]; activeCommandIndex: number; readonly error: Rx.Observable<unknown>; private get errored(); constructor({ outputStream, group, commands, }: { outputStream: Writable; group: boolean; commands: Command[]; }); private ensureWritable; write(command: Command | undefined, text: string): void; private flushBuffer; }
